title: Countries Delight
description: Adds traditional and iconic dishes from different countries.
body: 📖 About Countries Delight is a mod that brings iconic and traditional food from around the world into Minecraft! Currently, the mod features dishes from Italy, USA, Mexico, Japan, India and Germany. Each country adds several unique foods - and some of the most famous dishes even come in block form! The best part? Every week, we host a community vote on our Discord server to decide which country's cuisine will be added next. For example, Mexico was added thanks to a community vote! If you love the idea - come join us and help shape the next update! --- 🗳️ Interactive Voting Every week, you get to vote for the next country! Will it be France? Maybe India? Or perhaps China? Your voice matters - and your favorite foods could appear next! Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8x6HYdkw) --- 📃 Features - World Cuisines: Dishes from Italy, Mexico, USA, Japan, India and Germany - Iconic Dishes: Pizza, Taco, Brownies, Miso Soup, Chicken Curry and Bratwurst - Weekly Discord Voting: community driven development - Christmas Dishes: Dishes from USA - Lunar Dishes: Dishes from Korea --- 📝 Description Foods by Country: 🇮🇹 Italy: Adds 11 Italian dishes + 1 block food — Pizza --- 🇲🇽 Mexico: Adds 16 Mexican dishes + 1 block food — Taco --- 🇺🇸 USA: Adds 12 American dishes + 1 block food — Brownies --- 🇯🇵 Japan: Adds 11 Japanese dishes + 1 block food — Miso Soup --- 🇮🇳 India: Adds 13 India dishes + 1 block food — Chicken Curry --- 🇩🇪 Germany: Adds 14 Germany dishes + 1 block food — Bratwurst --- 🇨🇳 China: Adds 11 China dishes + 1 block food — Fried Rice --- 🇰🇷 South Korea: Adds 10 South Korea dishes + 1 block food — Kimchi --- 🇸🇪 Sweden: Adds 10 Sweden dishes + 1 block food — Kottbullar --- 🧾 Credits This mod includes content originally distributed under the MIT License. All necessary permissions have been obtained. The current version remains under MIT License, although major changes were made to the code and several textures were modified. Addon for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
